cleanup.title: Cleanup
cleanup.callout_protected_desc: OpenCleaner never deletes your login credentials or browser sessions.
cleanup.disk_sub: Free space status on each detected volume
cleanup.tasks_sub: Check the categories to clean then start the operation
cleanup.callout_check_hint: Check at least one category above
cleanup.btn_clean_tip: Starts cleanup of checked categories. Deleted files are unrecoverable.
cleanup.callout_admin_desc: The hibernation file, restore points and registry cleanup affect protected Windows components. Click on
cleanup.callout_admin_suffix: at the bottom left to relaunch OpenCleaner with the required rights.
tools.title: Tools
tools.group.disk_desc: Identify what takes up space and recover disk space.
tools.group.software_desc: Manage your applications, updates, browser extensions and startup programs.
tools.group.system_desc: Windows component cleanup and maintenance: registry, shortcuts, hibernation and restore points.
tools.group.privacy_desc: Erase activity traces left on this PC: recent files, history, clipboard.
tools.smart.title: Smart analysis
tools.smart.sub: Scans all your drives and detects large forgotten folders and bulky files
tools.dupes.title: Duplicate search
tools.dupes.sub: Identical files or subfolders within the same parent
tools.installers.title: Old installers
tools.installers.sub: Unused .exe, .msi, .zip, .iso files for a long time
tools.wic.title: Windows Installer Cache
tools.wic.sub: C:\Windows\Installer — MSI/MSP used for repairs and updates. Clean only via the Microsoft tool (risky otherwise).
tools.wic.why_no_delete_desc: These files are used by Windows to repair Office, Adobe, and other apps during updates. Manually deleting them can break these repairs. Use "Disk Cleanup" (cleanmgr) — the Microsoft tool that can identify and remove only truly obsolete packages.
tools.empty_folders.title: Empty folders
tools.empty_folders.sub: Folders with no files left by uninstallations
tools.orphans.title: Orphan folders
tools.orphans.sub: Program Files folders with no corresponding registry entry — deletion requires admin rights
tools.winold.title: Windows.old
tools.winold.sub: Previous Windows installation kept after a major update
tools.uc.title: Update center
tools.uc.sub: Windows, drivers and installed software — all sources in one place
tools.uc.click_analyze: Click "Analyze all" to start the unified scan.
tools.uc.loading: Analyzing Windows + drivers + software… (may take 1–3 min)
tools.apps.title: Installed applications
tools.apps.sub: Categorization, last use, broken entry detection, silent uninstall via winget
tools.apps.remove_entry_title: Removes the orphan registry entry (the exe no longer exists)
tools.uwp.title: Pre-installed Windows apps
tools.uwp.sub: UWP bloatware shipped with Windows 11 (Bing News, Clipchamp, Xbox apps, Your Phone, etc.)
tools.uwp.click_analyze: Click "Analyze" to list detected bloat apps.
tools.uwp.review_label: Review — may be useful depending on use case
tools.repair.title: System repair
tools.repair.sub: Windows troubleshooting actions (DNS, Winsock, Store, SFC, DISM, Windows Update…)
tools.repair.click_load: Click "Load" to see available repair tools.
tools.ext.title: Browser extensions
tools.ext.sub: Manage extensions installed in Chrome, Edge, Brave and Firefox
tools.bd.title: Browser data — granular management
tools.bd.sub: Cache, cookies, history, sessions, passwords… per profile. Choose what you keep.
tools.bd.click_analyze: Click "Analyze" to list data per profile.
tools.startup.title: Startup programs
tools.startup.sub: Registry HKCU/HKLM + Startup folders. Non-destructive enable/disable (StartupApproved).
tools.registry.title: Registry cleanup
tools.registry.sub: Detects and removes obsolete Windows registry entries
tools.registry.callout_desc: The registry contains references to applications or files that were uninstalled but whose traces were not removed. They cause no damage but needlessly clutter the registry. Removal is risk-free.
tools.shortcuts.title: Broken shortcuts
tools.shortcuts.sub: Desktop and Start Menu shortcuts pointing to deleted programs
tools.hibernation.title: Hibernation file
tools.rp.title: Restore points
tools.rp.sub: Delete old Windows restore points to free up space
tools.rp.admin_required: Administrator rights required to access restore points.
tools.privacy.title: Privacy cleanup
tools.privacy.sub: Recent files, address bar history, jump lists, clipboard
health.title: Health
health.desc: Analyzes 6 key indicators to assess the overall state of your PC: disk space, temporary files, browser cache, startup, recycle bin and app cache.
health.indicators_sub: Complete diagnosis of each analyzed component
drivers.title: Drivers
drivers.sub: Name, manufacturer, version and date of each hardware driver installed on the system.
drivers.wu_btn: Search for updates via Windows Update
perso.title: Windows Customization
perso.sub: Disable unnecessary features. Everything is reversible.
perso.chart_sub: Updates in real-time with each toggle.
perso.detail_empty: Click an item to see its details.
activity.title: Activity
confirm.admin_body: This feature requires administrator rights. The application will relaunch with the necessary rights.
confirm.quit_body: The local server will be stopped. You can relaunch the application at any time.
confirm.quit_done: OpenCleaner stopped. You can close this tab.
confirm.uninstall_silent: Uninstall "{name}" silently? No popup will appear.
confirm.uninstall_normal: Uninstall "{name}"? Windows will open the uninstaller.
confirm.remove_ext_body: The extension folder will be permanently deleted from disk. The browser will need to be restarted.
confirm.delete_winold_body: The previous Windows installation ({size}) will be permanently deleted. You will no longer be able to revert to the previous Windows version.
confirm.disable_hibernation_body: hiberfil.sys ({size}) will be deleted and hibernation will no longer be available. You can re-enable it anytime via power options.
confirm.delete_rp_body: These points will be permanently deleted. Make sure to keep at least one recent point if you wish to be able to restore your system.
confirm.registry_body: The selected references will be removed from the Windows registry. This action is risk-free for your system.
confirm.remove_broken_body: This removes "{name}" from Windows "Programs and Features" list. It does not uninstall anything (the exe is already missing).
confirm.sensitive_body: You are about to delete SENSITIVE data (passwords / autofill). This action is irreversible. Continue?
confirm.shortcuts_body: The selected .lnk files will be permanently deleted. This does not affect the applications themselves.
confirm.empty_folders_body: These folders are empty and will be permanently deleted.
toast.all_copies_warn: You cannot delete all copies in a group.
toast.all_folders_warn: You cannot delete all folders in a group.
toast.admin_required_hklm: Relaunch as administrator to modify HKLM.
toast.disk_cleanup_body: The Microsoft tool has been launched. Check "Windows Installer Files" to clean this cache.
toast.preset_nothing_body: All features of this preset are already in the target state.
modal.help_intro: OpenCleaner is a local PC cleaner that never touches your passwords or session cookies. Everything works offline, on your machine.
modal.help_cleanup: Removes unnecessary files: caches, temporary files, thumbnails. Click on tasks to select them then "Start cleanup".
modal.help_tools: Advanced detection: duplicates, large files, old installers, registry, broken shortcuts, restore points and more.
modal.help_health: Evaluates the overall state of your PC across 6 indicators and suggests corrective actions.
modal.help_admin_text: Some tasks (registry, hibernation, restore points) require administrator rights. Click "Administrator mode" at the bottom of the sidebar to relaunch the application with the necessary rights.
modal.history_no_data_desc: Your future cleanup sessions will appear here.
modal.sessions_no_data_desc: Recent deletions will appear here and can be undone in one click.
